title: Debug missing avatar polls on refinery

log.context: Debug missing avatar polls on refinery

**Bug found and fixed** in `/mnt/data/hello-world/refinery.html`:

The `avatar` branch (line ~1383) in the poll rendering loop was building the section element and appending avatar cards to it, but never called `container.appendChild(section)` to add it to the DOM. Both the `sprite` branch and the `else` (generic) branch had this call, but it was simply missing from the avatar branch.

**Fix:** Added `container.appendChild(section)` after the avatar cards are built, plus a subtitle element for v...(truncated)
